---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
# necroptosis_followup.R
# Run AFTER your main enrichment Rmd. Focuses analyses/plots on "Necroptosis".

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(openxlsx)
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(enrichplot)
  library(AnnotationDbi)
  library(org.Gg.eg.db)
  library(KEGGREST)
  library(pathview)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)
  library(glue)
  library(grid)
})

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 0) Inputs / output
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
in_rds <- "output/enrichment_objects.rds"
if (!file.exists(in_rds)) stop("Missing ", in_rds, ". Run the main script first.")

objs <- readRDS(in_rds)
# expected in objs: ego, ekegg, ereact, gsea_go, gsea_go_MF, gsea_kegg, fc_vec

outdir <- file.path("output", "necroptosis")
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# KEGG organism code (adjust if needed)
kegg_code <- "gga"

# optional: global theme
theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 11))

# SVG saver guard (avoid svglite dependency issues)
save_plot <- local({
  can_svg <- suppressWarnings(requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE))
  function(p, fname, w = 7, h = 5){
    fpdf <- file.path(outdir, fname)
    ggsave(fpdf, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
    if (grepl("\\.pdf$", fname) && isTRUE(can_svg)) {
      fsvg <- file.path(outdir, sub("\\.pdf$", ".svg", fname))
      ggsave(fsvg, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
    }
  }
})

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Helpers & pattern
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
as_df <- function(res, id_col = "geneID"){
  if (is.null(res)) return(tibble::tibble())
  df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
  if (!id_col %in% names(df)) return(df)   # don't rename if column absent
  dplyr::rename(df, Genes = !!id_col)
}

make_dot <- function(res, stub, title, n_cat=15, wrap_width=60,
                     text_size=9, text_angle=0, w=7, h=5){
  df <- as.data.frame(res); if (nrow(df) == 0) return(invisible())
  df <- df[seq_len(min(n_cat, nrow(df))), ]
  df$Description <- stringr::str_wrap(df$Description, width = wrap_width)

  if (all(c("GeneRatio","Count") %in% names(df))) {
    df$GeneRatioNum <- vapply(strsplit(df$GeneRatio, "/"),
                              function(x) as.numeric(x[1])/as.numeric(x[2]),
                              numeric(1))
    x_var <- "GeneRatioNum"; x_lab <- "Gene ratio"; size_var <- "Count"
  } else if (all(c("NES","setSize") %in% names(df))) {
    x_var <- "NES"; x_lab <- "NES"; size_var <- "setSize"
  } else return(invisible())

  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x=x_var, y=paste0("reorder(Description,",x_var,")"),
                             size=size_var, colour="p.adjust")) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_colour_continuous(trans="reverse", name="adj-P") +
    scale_size(range=c(2,6)) +
    labs(title=title, x=x_lab, y=NULL) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=text_size, angle=text_angle,
                                     hjust=ifelse(text_angle==0,1,0.5)))
  save_plot(p, sprintf("dotplot_%s.pdf", stub), w, h)
}

# pattern for matching
necro_kw <- c("necroptosis", "necroptotic", "programmed necrosis")
necro_pattern <- paste(necro_kw, collapse = "|")

# Map ENTREZ → SYMBOL for readability in exports
orgDb <- org.Gg.eg.db
entrex_ids <- names(objs$fc_vec)
sym_map <- tryCatch(
  AnnotationDbi::select(orgDb, keys = entrex_ids, columns = c("SYMBOL"), keytype = "ENTREZID"),
  error = function(e) data.frame(ENTREZID = entrex_ids, SYMBOL = NA_character_)
)
sym_map <- sym_map %>% distinct(ENTREZID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Subset "Necroptosis" across results
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ego_df        <- as_df(objs$ego)                 # GO BP ORA (has geneID)
ekegg_df      <- as_df(objs$ekegg)               # KEGG ORA (has geneID)
ereact_df     <- as_df(objs$ereact)              # Reactome ORA (has geneID)

# GSEA tables use 'core_enrichment' instead of 'geneID'
gsea_go_df    <- as_df(objs$gsea_go,    id_col = "core_enrichment")
gsea_mf_df    <- as_df(objs$gsea_go_MF, id_col = "core_enrichment")
gsea_kegg_df  <- as_df(objs$gsea_kegg,  id_col = "core_enrichment")

# For filtering, operate on raw frames from the objects (to keep all columns)
ego_df_raw    <- as.data.frame(objs$ego)
ekegg_df_raw  <- as.data.frame(objs$ekegg)
ereact_df_raw <- as.data.frame(objs$ereact)

pick_necro <- function(df){
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0 || !("Description" %in% colnames(df))) return(df[0,])
  df[grepl(necro_pattern, df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
}

necro_GO_ORA    <- pick_necro(ego_df_raw)
necro_KEGG_ORA  <- pick_necro(ekegg_df_raw)
necro_REACT     <- pick_necro(ereact_df_raw)
necro_GO_GSEA   <- pick_necro(as.data.frame(objs$gsea_go))
necro_MF_GSEA   <- pick_necro(as.data.frame(objs$gsea_go_MF))
necro_KEGG_GSEA <- pick_necro(as.data.frame(objs$gsea_kegg))

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Dotplots focused on necroptosis
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(necro_GO_ORA)  > 0) make_dot(necro_GO_ORA,   "GO_ORA_NECRO",   "Necroptosis (GO-BP ORA)")
if (nrow(necro_KEGG_ORA)> 0) make_dot(necro_KEGG_ORA, "KEGG_ORA_NECRO", "Necroptosis (KEGG ORA)")
if (nrow(necro_REACT)   > 0) make_dot(necro_REACT,    "REACT_NECRO",    "Necroptosis (Reactome ORA)")

if (nrow(necro_GO_GSEA)   > 0) make_dot(necro_GO_GSEA,   "GO_GSEA_NECRO",    "Necroptosis (GO-BP GSEA)")
if (nrow(necro_MF_GSEA)   > 0) make_dot(necro_MF_GSEA,   "GO_MF_GSEA_NECRO", "Necroptosis (GO-MF GSEA)")
if (nrow(necro_KEGG_GSEA) > 0) make_dot(necro_KEGG_GSEA, "KEGG_GSEA_NECRO",  "Necroptosis (KEGG GSEA)")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Ridgeplot / GSEA running plots for necroptosis terms (GO BP)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(necro_GO_GSEA) >= 1) {
  necro_ids <- necro_GO_GSEA$ID
  rows <- which(objs$gsea_go@result$ID %in% necro_ids)
  if (length(rows) >= 1) {
    gsea_go_necro <- objs$gsea_go
    gsea_go_necro@result <- gsea_go_necro@result[rows, , drop = FALSE]

    # Ridgeplot if at least 3 terms
    if (nrow(gsea_go_necro@result) >= 3) {
      pdf(file.path(outdir, "ridgeplot_GO_GSEA_NECRO.pdf"), 7, 0.5 * nrow(gsea_go_necro@result) + 2)
      print(enrichplot::ridgeplot(gsea_go_necro, showCategory = nrow(gsea_go_necro@result)) +
              labs(x="Enrichment score (NES)", y=NULL) +
              theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=10)))
      dev.off()
    }

    # Running score plots for up to 3 necro terms
    pdf(file.path(outdir, "gsea_running_score_NECRO.pdf"), 9, 6)
    for (id in head(gsea_go_necro@result$ID, 3)) {
      print(enrichplot::gseaplot2(objs$gsea_go, geneSetID = id))
    }
    dev.off()
  }
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) cnetplot (necro ORA) + Heatmap of necro genes (from ORA + GSEA)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
fc_vec <- objs$fc_vec

# cnet requires at least two terms
if (nrow(necro_GO_ORA) > 1) {
  ego_necro <- objs$ego
  ego_necro@result <- dplyr::filter(ego_necro@result, ID %in% necro_GO_ORA$ID)
  p <- cnetplot(ego_necro, showCategory = min(10, nrow(ego_necro@result)),
                foldChange = fc_vec, node_label = "all") +
       ggtitle("GO-BP cnetplot (Necroptosis subset)")
  save_plot(p, "cnetplot_GO_ORA_NECRO.pdf", 9, 8)
}

# Gather necro genes from ORA + GSEA
necro_gene_vec <- unique(unlist(strsplit(
  c(necro_GO_ORA$geneID,
    if ("core_enrichment" %in% colnames(necro_GO_GSEA))
      necro_GO_GSEA$core_enrichment else NULL),
  "/")))
necro_gene_vec <- necro_gene_vec[!is.na(necro_gene_vec) & nzchar(necro_gene_vec)]

# Heatmap of logFC for necro genes
if (length(necro_gene_vec) > 0) {
  common_entrez <- intersect(names(fc_vec), necro_gene_vec)
  if (length(common_entrez) > 0) {
    mat <- matrix(fc_vec[common_entrez], nrow = 1,
                  dimnames = list(NULL, common_entrez))
    # add SYMBOL labels if available
    lab_map <- sym_map %>% filter(ENTREZID %in% common_entrez)
    colnames(mat) <- ifelse(colnames(mat) %in% lab_map$ENTREZID,
                            lab_map$SYMBOL[match(colnames(mat), lab_map$ENTREZID)],
                            colnames(mat))
    col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
      c(-max(abs(mat)), 0, max(abs(mat))),
      c("royalblue", "white", "firebrick"))
    pdf(file.path(outdir, "heatmap_NECRO_gene_logFC.pdf"), 8, 2.8)
    ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(mat, name = "log2FC", col = col_fun,
                            cluster_columns = TRUE, show_row_names = FALSE,
                            column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 7))
    dev.off()
  }
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) KEGG Necroptosis pathway diagrams (Pathview)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Prefer IDs from KEGG ORA/GSEA subset; else, search KEGG for "Necroptosis".
kegg_necro_ids <- character(0)
if (nrow(necro_KEGG_ORA)  > 0) kegg_necro_ids <- unique(c(kegg_necro_ids, necro_KEGG_ORA$ID))
if (nrow(necro_KEGG_GSEA) > 0) kegg_necro_ids <- unique(c(kegg_necro_ids, necro_KEGG_GSEA$ID))
kegg_necro_ids <- unique(kegg_necro_ids)

if (length(kegg_necro_ids) == 0) {
  kdesc <- tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggList("pathway", kegg_code), error=function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(kdesc)) {
    all_terms <- data.frame(
      term = sub("path:", "", names(kdesc)),
      name = unname(kdesc),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    kegg_necro_ids <- all_terms$term[grepl("Necroptosis", all_terms$name, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  }
}

if (length(kegg_necro_ids) > 0) {
  kegg_outdir <- file.path(outdir, "pathview_necroptosis")
  dir.create(kegg_outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  for (pid in kegg_necro_ids) {
    clean_id <- sub(paste0("^", kegg_code), "", pid)  # pathview expects numeric part
    message("Pathview: rendering ", pid)
    old_wd <- getwd(); setwd(kegg_outdir)
    tryCatch({
      pathview(gene.data = fc_vec, pathway.id = clean_id, species = kegg_code,
               out.suffix = "logFC_necro", kegg.native = TRUE)
    }, error=function(e){
      message("Pathview error for ", pid, ": ", e$message)
    })
    setwd(old_wd)
  }
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Leading-edge details for necro GSEA (GO BP) with direction bars
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(necro_GO_GSEA) > 0 && "core_enrichment" %in% colnames(necro_GO_GSEA)) {
  le_necro <- necro_GO_GSEA %>%
    tidyr::separate_rows(core_enrichment, sep = "/") %>%
    dplyr::rename(ENTREZID = core_enrichment) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(logFC = as.numeric(fc_vec[ENTREZID])) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(sym_map, by = "ENTREZID") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(gene_label = dplyr::coalesce(SYMBOL, ENTREZID)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Direction = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(logFC) ~ "NA",
      logFC > 0 ~ "Up",
      logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "Neutral"
    ))

  # Export details
  openxlsx::write.xlsx(le_necro, file = file.path(outdir, "necro_GSEA_leading_edge.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

  # Stacked bar per term (if multiple)
  if (nrow(le_necro) > 0) {
    p_dir <- ggplot(le_necro %>% filter(Direction != "NA"),
                    aes(x = reorder(Description, NES), fill = Direction)) +
      geom_bar() +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = "Direction of leading-edge genes (Necroptosis GSEA terms)",
           y = "Leading-edge genes", x = NULL) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c(Up = "firebrick", Down = "forestgreen", Neutral = "grey70")) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 10)
    save_plot(p_dir, "gsea_necro_leading_edge_direction_bars.pdf", 8,
              0.4 * dplyr::n_distinct(le_necro$Description) + 2)

    # Gene bars for top term (by |NES|)
    top_term <- le_necro %>% dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(NES))) %>% dplyr::pull(ID) %>% .[1]
    if (!is.na(top_term)) {
      top_df <- le_necro %>% filter(ID == top_term, !is.na(logFC)) %>%
        arrange(desc(abs(logFC))) %>% head(25)
      if (nrow(top_df) > 0) {
        p <- ggplot(top_df, aes(x = reorder(gene_label, logFC), y = logFC, fill = logFC)) +
          geom_col() + coord_flip() +
          labs(title = glue("Leading-edge genes: {unique(top_df$Description)}"),
               x = "Gene symbol", y = "log2 fold change") +
          theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
          scale_fill_gradient2(low = "royalblue", mid = "white", high = "firebrick")
        save_plot(p, "gsea_leading_edge_top_NECRO.pdf", 8, 5)
      }
    }
  }
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) Workbook summary
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
wb <- createWorkbook()
add <- function(sheet, df){
  addWorksheet(wb, sheet)
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(as.data.frame(df)) == 0) {
    writeData(wb, sheet, data.frame(Note = "No results"))
  } else writeData(wb, sheet, df)
}

add("GO_BP_ORA_necro",    necro_GO_ORA)
add("KEGG_ORA_necro",     necro_KEGG_ORA)
add("Reactome_ORA_necro", necro_REACT)
add("GO_BP_GSEA_necro",   necro_GO_GSEA)
add("GO_MF_GSEA_necro",   necro_MF_GSEA)
add("KEGG_GSEA_necro",    necro_KEGG_GSEA)

necro_summary <- data.frame(
  Set      = c("GO-BP ORA","KEGG ORA","Reactome ORA","GO-BP GSEA","GO-MF GSEA","KEGG GSEA"),
  N_terms  = c(nrow(necro_GO_ORA), nrow(necro_KEGG_ORA), nrow(necro_REACT),
               nrow(necro_GO_GSEA), nrow(necro_MF_GSEA), nrow(necro_KEGG_GSEA)),
  Top_term = c(na.omit(necro_GO_ORA$Description)[1],
               na.omit(necro_KEGG_ORA$Description)[1],
               na.omit(necro_REACT$Description)[1],
               na.omit(necro_GO_GSEA$Description)[1],
               na.omit(necro_MF_GSEA$Description)[1],
               na.omit(necro_KEGG_GSEA$Description)[1]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
add("Summary", necro_summary)

saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(outdir, "necroptosis_summary.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9) Done
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo_necroptosis.txt"))
cat("\n✓ Necroptosis follow-up complete — see '", outdir, "'\n", sep = "")


```
